subject: Make This Year the Year of Learning -- Try a Digital Subscription for Just $5 for 12 Weeks
body:

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

2014 RESOLUTION: STIMULATE YOUR MIND

JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS5422B81HXJB836zxAAwENc4t/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Times Reader, 

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you 
to ideas, influences and inspiration from around the world. This 
New Year, resolve to keep learning and growing with a Times Digital 
Subscription: just $5 for 12 weeks. 

Expand your horizons with unlimited access to the recently 
redesigned NYTimes.com, delivering new features and a streamlined 
experience to make the best news site on the web even better. Plus 
receive unlimited access to all of our apps for smartphones 
and tablets. 

Have the world's finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, 
anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special offer: just 
$5 for 12 weeks. 


REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS5422B81HXJB836zxAAwENc4t/sub2

*****

JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS5422B81HXJB836zxAAwENc4t/sub3

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times 
digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, 
Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile 
apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for 
the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 
12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit 
card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week 
billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, 
refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale 
policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

Dear Times Reader,

Expand your horizons with unlimited access to the recently redesigned NYTimes.com, delivering new features and a streamlined experience to make the best news site on the web even better. Plus receive unlimited access to all of our apps for smartphones and tablets.
